textData.text: Corradetti Glassblowing Studio is Baltimore's most distinctive and artistic wedding venue, nestled in the award-winning historic Clipper Mill complex in the Woodberry neighborhood. This stunning 3,400 sq ft space features soaring 20-foot ceilings, exposed brick walls, bamboo hardwood flooring, large windows, and a modern pool fashioned after a Roman bath. Permanent fixtures include a built-in bar, glass sculptural elements, hanging party lights, and an elevated stage — minimal additional décor needed. The rental includes the gallery level filled with vibrant blown-glass artwork made on site. Optional live glassblowing demonstrations can be added for guests. Capacity: up to 110 standing, 75 for a seated dinner. Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events works with this venue as part of their approved caterer network.

textData.text: Nestled on the banks of the South River minutes from downtown Annapolis, Historic London Town & Gardens is a premier waterfront wedding venue set on 23 acres of pristine gardens and historic grounds. Established in 1683, the property features the circa 1760 William Brown House — a National Historic Landmark — a gorgeous glass waterfront pavilion, a 185-foot pier, sweeping river views, and year-round blooms. Ceremonies are held on scenic waterfront lawns with a beautiful indoor pavilion as weather backup. Up to 200 guests. Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events is an approved caterer at this venue.

textData.text: Built in 1811, Historic Oakland Mansion is one of the most beautiful and historic buildings in Howard County, Maryland. Ceremonies take place on the sweeping front lawn or in the garden, with tented receptions available on the back patio. Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events is proud to serve Historic Oakland Mansion as an approved outside caterer at this iconic Howard County venue.

Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events partners with Stone Ridge Hollow to deliver exceptional farm-inspired, locally sourced menus that honor the beauty of the Maryland countryside.

textData.text: Strong Mansion at Sugarloaf Mountain in Dickerson, Maryland is a strikingly beautiful event venue set at the foot of Sugarloaf Mountain in Montgomery County. This elegant early 20th-century manor house features exquisite period details, formal gardens, and stunning views of the surrounding countryside and mountain, creating a romantic and distinguished setting for weddings and private events. Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events is honored to serve Strong Mansion, delivering refined and carefully crafted menus that match the timeless sophistication of this extraordinary Maryland venue.

textData.text: Swan Harbor Farm in Havre de Grace, Maryland is a picturesque working farm and event venue situated along the Chesapeake Bay in Harford County. With its sweeping bay views, historic barn, and beautifully maintained grounds, Swan Harbor Farm offers an idyllic setting for outdoor weddings, receptions, and social gatherings. Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events is delighted to pair its locally inspired, farm-fresh menus with the natural splendor of this beloved Chesapeake Bay venue.

textData.text: The Atreeum at Soaring Timbers is a modern, post-and-beam event venue nestled among the trees just off Bestgate Road in Annapolis, Maryland — perfectly situated minutes from downtown Annapolis yet offering the privacy and seclusion of a family estate. With 4,000 square feet of open floor plan, soaring vaulted ceilings, and sophisticated neutral décor, The Atreeum serves as a breathtaking blank canvas for weddings, receptions, and special events of all styles. The main banquet hall accommodates up to 275 seated guests with ample room for dining, dancing, and mingling, bathed in natural light from all sides. The venue features a sweeping staircase and balcony ideal for grand entrances and cocktail hours, along with a beautifully appointed bridal suite with a wet bar and lounge area, a full commercial kitchen, and a well-stocked bar. Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events is proud to serve as an approved caterer at The Atreeum at Soaring Timbers, delivering exceptional food and service for this beloved Anne Arundel County venue.

seoTitle: The Atreeum at Soaring Timbers Wedding Venue | Annapolis MD
title: The Atreeum at Soaring Timbers
seoDescription: The Atreeum at Soaring Timbers is a stunning modern event venue in Annapolis, MD featuring 4,000 sq ft of open floor plan space, soaring ceilings, and elegant décor. Catered by Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events.

mapLocation.formatted: 1 Safari Place, Baltimore, MD 21217, USA

textData.text: The Maryland Zoo in Baltimore offers one of the most unique and unforgettable wedding experiences in Maryland, set across 135 acres in the urban oasis of Druid Hill Park. The crown jewel for weddings is the historic Mansion House (circa 1801), featuring a stunning wrap-around porch with individually controlled chandeliers, large windows overlooking the park, and full climate control — accommodating up to 180 guests. The Lakeside Pavilion offers breathtaking waterfront views with a fountain for outdoor ceremonies, and the Penguin Coast exhibit provides a one-of-a-kind backdrop for smaller ceremonies and cocktail hours. Optional animal ambassador encounters — including penguins, owls, and other wildlife — can be added for guests. Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events is an approved caterer at The Maryland Zoo, bringing exceptional food and service to this truly magical Baltimore venue.

seoTitle: Maryland Zoo Wedding Venue | Baltimore City MD
title: The Maryland Zoo
seoDescription: Host a one-of-a-kind wedding at The Maryland Zoo in Baltimore, MD. Unique indoor and outdoor event spaces in Druid Hill Park, including the historic 1801 Mansion House. Catered by Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events.

textData.text: Vignon Manor Farm is a luxury barn wedding venue nestled on a 160-acre private family-owned estate in Havre de Grace, Maryland. Fully climate-controlled with nearly 30,000 sq ft of event space, the venue features a grand main barn with large windows and chandeliers, a two-story Octagon cocktail space with spiral staircase and intricate stonework, and a spacious Manor House with a bridal suite and full bar for getting ready. The property offers 360-degree views of rolling hills and multiple ceremony options both indoors and outdoors. Family-owned and operated since 1997. Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events is proud to serve events at Vignon Manor Farm, where outside caterers are welcome.

seoTitle: Vignon Manor Farm Wedding Venue | Havre de Grace, Harford County MD
title: Vignon Manor Farm
seoDescription: Vignon Manor Farm in Havre de Grace, Maryland is a luxury barn wedding venue on a 160-acre private estate in Harford County. Climate-controlled with stunning views and up to 275 guests.

textData.text: Westminster Hall in downtown Baltimore is one of Maryland's most historic and architecturally magnificent event venues, dating back to 1852. Its soaring Gothic-style ceilings, original stonework, and stained glass create an atmosphere of timeless grandeur, perfect for elegant weddings and formal celebrations. Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events has the privilege of serving Westminster Hall, delivering world-class cuisine that matches the venue's incomparable beauty and heritage.

textData.text: The World Trade Center Baltimore offers one of the most spectacular event settings in Maryland, with 360-degree panoramic views of the Baltimore Inner Harbor from its top-floor venue. This iconic skyscraper, the world's tallest pentagonal building, creates an awe-inspiring backdrop for weddings, corporate events, and milestone celebrations. Absolutely Perfect Catering & Events elevates every occasion at the World Trade Center with exceptional cuisine and impeccable service worthy of the stunning skyline views.
